my_thoughts: They washed their body gently after session. This is spontaneous reparation - caring for body after seeing how they've neglected it. Teacher validates by naming: 'reparation.' This makes unconscious healing conscious. They weren't thinking 'I'm doing reparation,' they just did it. Now they know: gentle body care = repair. Can replicate. Single turn validates healthy instinct and makes it visible as pattern.
accumulated_insight: T1 (Single-turn): Student reports washing body gently after session as reparative act. Teacher validates and names this as reparation: caring for body after recognizing past neglect/abuse. This is RM_02: reinforces pattern recognition of healthy behavior. Student is already doing the repair work, teacher names it so they can recognize pattern and repeat it. Consolidation of spontaneous healthy behavior.
visible_response: How do you imagine washing his body in a loving way?
